column5: # Required | Three-letter IATA code for origin airport.
column6: # Required | Three-letter IATA code for destination airport.
column7: # Optional | A short; relevant description of the flight. Include specific or unique details. Use plain text and don't enter text in all capital letters. Character limit: 5;000.

Videos must be in a supported format (.3g2; .3gp; .3gpp; .asf; .avi; .dat; .divx; .dv; .f4v; .flv; .gif; .m2ts; .m4v; .mkv; .mod; .mov; .mp4; .mpe; .mpeg; .mpeg4; .mpg; .mts; .nsv; .ogm; .ogv; .qt; .tod; .ts; .vob or .wmv).
